verses.text: Topa in Moses kiangah
“Hih pen amah a kisian'sak ni-in mi phakpa' zuih ding ngeina hi ding hi. Siampipa kiangah amah kipaipih ding a
giahphual pualamah siampipa paikhia-in vel ding hi. Tua ciangin a phaknatna pen a phakpa' tung pan a dam leh
a kisiangsak ding mipa-a' dingin a hing vasa siang nih leh taamtak sing leh a ausan puan leh puknah a la dingin siampipa in amaute sawl ding hi
Amaute in lei beel khat sunga kikoih tuiluang tungah a vasa khat a gawh ding uh siampipa in thu pia ding hi
Amah in a hing lai vasa pen taamtak sing leh a ausan puan leh puknah tawh la khawmin, tuate leh a hing lai vasa pen tuiluang tunga kithat vasa' si sungah diah ding hi
Amah in phaknatna panin a kisiangsak dingpa' tungah sagihvei theh ding a, tua ciangin amah siang hi, ci-in gen ding a, a hing vasa pen gamlakah khah ding hi

A kisiangsak ding mipa in a puante sawpin, a mul khempeuh metkhia-in, tui sungah amahmah kisilin, amah a siang hi ding hi. Tua khit ciangin amah giahphualah hong ciah ding a, ahih hangin ama puanbuk pualamah ni sagih sung om ding hi
A ni sagih ni-in amah in a sam, a khamul leh a mitkhu mul, leh a pum tungah a om a mul khempeuh metkhia ding hi. Tua ciangin amah in a puante sawpin, tui sungah a pumpi silin, amah a siang hi ding hi
“A ni giat ni-in amah in a sitbaanglo tuuno a pa nih, leh a sitbaanglo kum khat a pha tuuno a nu khat, leh an tawh biakna ahi sathau tawh annel lawh thum leh sathau biingta khat la ding hi
Amah a siangsak ding siampipa in a kisiangsak ding mipa leh hih nate, kikhopna bukkonga Topa' mai-ah paipih ding hi
Siampipa in tuuno a pa khat la-in sathau biingta khat tawh mawhna hanga biakna-in pia-in, vei-a biakna-in Topa' mai-ah tuate vei ding hi

Amaute in khialhna hanga biakna leh meihal biakna, siangtho mun sunga a gawhna mun uhah amah in tuuno go ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mawhna hanga biakna pen khialhna hanga biakna mah bangin siampipa-a' hi a, tua pen a siangthopen ahi hi
Siampipa in mawhna hanga biakna si tawmkhat la-in, tua si pen a kisiangthosak ding mipa' taklam bilteep, a taklam khutpi, leh a taklam khepi nuh ding hi
Tua ciangin sathau biingta panin kimkhat la-in amahmah' veilam khutsungah sungin
a veilam khutsunga om sathau sungah a taklam khutme diahin, a khutme tawh a sathau kimkhatte Topa' mai-ah sagihvei theh ding hi
Ama khutsungah a omlai sathau kimkhatte pen siampipa in a kisiangthosak ding mipa' taklam bilteep, a taklam khutpi, leh a taklam khepi nuhin, mawhna hanga biakna si tungah koih ding hi
Siampipa in a khutsunga sathau omlai teng a kisiangthosak ding mipa' lu nilh ding hi. Tua ciangin siampipa in ama-a' dingin Topa' mai-ah kilemna bawlsak ding hi
“A nitna panin a kisiangthosak ding mipa-a' ding kilemna bawlna dingin siampipa in a khialhna hanga biakna pia ding hi. Tua khit ciangin amah in meihal biakna go ding a
meihal biakna leh an tawh biaknate, biakna tau tungah pia ding hi. Tua bangin siampipa in ama-a' dingin kilemna bawlsak ding a, amah a siang hi ding hi

“Ahih hangin amah zawngin tuazah a piakzawh kei leh, ama-a' ding kilemna bawlna dingin a kivei ding, mawhna hanga biakna-in tuuno a pa khat, an tawh biakna dingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel lawh khat leh sathau biingta khat pia ding a
vakhu nih ahi a, kawl vakhuno nih ahi zongin, a piakzawh bangbang pia ding hi. Khat pen khialhna hanga biakna ding hi a, a khat pen meihal biakna ding ahi hi
A ni giat ni-in amah in Topa' mai, kikhopna bukkong, siampipa kiangah ama kisian'thosakna dingin tuate paipih ding hi
Siampipa in mawhna hanga biakna tuuno, leh a sathau biingta khat la-in, vei-a biakna-in Topa' mai-ah tuate vei ding hi
Amah in mawhna hanga biakna tuuno go ding hi. Siampipa in mawhna hanga biakna si tawmkhat la-in, a kisiangthosak ding mipa' taklam bilteep, a taklam khutpi, leh a taklam khepi nuh ding hi
Siampipa in amahmah' veilam khutsungah a sathau kimkhat sung ding a
a veilam khutsunga a om sathau tawmkhat a taklam khutme tawh Topa' mai-ah sagihvei theh ding hi
Siampipa in ama khutsunga a om sathau tawmkhat a kisiangthosak ding mipa' taklam bilteep, taklam khutpi, leh a taklam khepite, mawhna hanga biakna si a kikoihna munah va nuh ding hi
Siampipa in a khutsunga a omlai sathau teng a kisiangthosak ding mipa-a' ding Topa' mai-ah kilemna bawlna dingin a lu nilhsak ding hi
Amah in vakhu hita leh kawl vakhuno hita leh, a piakzawh bangbang pia-in
khat pen khialhna hanga biakna ding, a khat pen meihal biakna dingin an-a biakna tawh pia khawm ding hi. Siampipa in a kisiangthosakpa-a' dingin Topa' mai-ah kilemna bawlsak ding hi
Hih pen phaknatna a vei, a kisiangthosakna dingin biakna a pia zolopa-a' dingin ngeina ahi hi,” a ci hi
Topa in Moses leh Aaron kiangah
“Note-a' dingin kong piak Kanaan gamah na om ciangun note' leitanga inn khat sungah phaknatna kong tun'sak ciangin
inn neipa pai-in siampipa kiangah, ‘Ka inn sungah natna nam khat a om ding tawh kibang,’ ci ding hi

Tua ciangin, inn sunga om na khempeuh a nin hi, a kicih khaklohna dingin a natna a vel dingin siampipa a pai ma-in amaute in tua inn a na hawmsakna ding uh thu pia ding a, tua khit ciangin inn vel dingin siampipa pai ding hi
Amah in a natna vel ding hi. A natna pen tua inn kawm tungah omin, a hing mel ahih kei leh a san mel na pua-in, tua natna kawm maitang sangin a thuk zawk tuak leh
innsung panin innkongah siampipa paikhia ding a, ni sagih sung inn khakcip ding hi
A ni sagih ni-in siampipa hong paikikin en ding hi. Tua inn kawm tungah a natna a kizelh leh
natna a baan'na suang lakhia-in khuapi pualam a nin mun khatah a paipihna dingun siampipa in thu pia ding hi
Amah in a innsung kimkot kiatsakin, amaute in a kiatkhiat, a kizutna themte, khuapi pualam a nin mun khatah bua ding uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute in suang dang la-in, tua suangte' omna munah koihin, amah in zutna dang la-in tua inn zut ding hi
“Amah in a suangte lakhia-in a inn kiatin a zut khit ciangin tua inn sungah natna hong suahkik leh
siampipa pai-in en ding hi. Inn sungah a natna a kizelh leh, tua pen inn sunga om a lauhuai phaknatna hi a, tua inn a nin ahi hi
Amah in tua inn, a sing a suang leh inn a kizutnate khempeuh phel ding a, khuapi pualam a nin mun khatah tuate puakhia ding hi
Tua thamloin tua inn a kikhakcip sungteng a sungah a lut mipa a nitak dong a nin hi ding hi
Tua inn sungah a lum mipa leh an a ne mipa in ama puante sawp ding hi
“Ahih hangin siampipa hong pai-in a vel a, a inn a kizut khit ciangin inn sungah natna a kizelh kei leh, tua ciangin a natna dam ahih manin siampipa in tua inn siang hi, ci-in gen ding hi
Tua inn siangthosakna dingin amah in vasa neu nih, taamtak sing leh a ausan khau leh puknah tawh la khawmin
beel sunga kikoih tui luang tungah a vasa khat go ding a
taamtak sing leh puknah leh a ausan khau pen a vasa hing tawh la khawmin, tua pen a kigo vasa' si leh tuiluang sungah diahin, tua inn sagihvei theh ding hi
Tua bangin amah in vasa si tawh, tuiluang tawh, a hing vasa tawh, taamtak sing leh puknah leh a ausan khau tawh a inn siangsak ding a
vasa hing pen khuapi pualam gamlakah khahkhia ding hi. Tua bangin amah in tua inn-a' dingin kilemna bawlsak ding a, tua inn a siang hi ding hi,” a ci hi
Hih pen phaknatna khat peuhpeuh tawh kisai-in ngeina ahi hi: Cithak tawh kisai
puan tung hita leh innsung hita leh-ah a om phaknatna tawh kisai
a bawk hita leh meima hita leh a tuampian' khat peuhpeuh tawh kisai-in
bang hunin nin a, bang hunin siang hiam, ci-in lahna ding ahi hi. Hih pen phaknatna tawh kisai ngeina ahi hi.
